zh-CN.name: 玉米粥
zh-CN.intro: 玉米粥是用玉米面煮成的粥，黄黄的、暖暖的，喝起来很舒服。早餐喝一碗玉米粥，一整天都有精神。

story.title: 🥣一碗暖暖的玉米粥
story.body: 早上，外面刮着冷风，豆豆躲在被窝里不想出来。忽然，一阵香香的、甜甜的味道飘进来，豆豆吸了吸鼻子，坐了起来。奶奶在厨房煮玉米粥，锅里咕嘟咕嘟冒着热气，金黄色的粥像小太阳一样。奶奶盛了一碗，说：“喝碗热粥，全身都暖洋洋的。”豆豆小心喝了一口，软软的、滑滑的，从嘴巴一直暖到小脚丫。他开心地一大口一大口喝完，还舔了舔嘴角，说：“奶奶，明天早上还要喝玉米粥！”奶奶笑眯眯地答应了。从此，每个冷冷的早晨，豆豆都会想起那碗金黄色的暖粥。

knowledge.title: 玉米粥是怎么做的？
knowledge.body: 把玉米面放进凉水里搅拌成糊糊，再慢慢倒进滚烫的开水里，一边倒一边搅，煮几分钟后，粥就变得粘粘的、香香的啦。

en.name: Corn Porridge
en.intro: Corn porridge is made from cornmeal. It's yellow, warm, and so cozy. A bowl of corn porridge for breakfast gives you energy all day.

story.title: 🥣A Bowl of Warm Corn Porridge
story.body: One morning, a cold wind was blowing outside, and Doudou didn't want to leave his warm bed. But then a sweet smell drifted into the room. Doudou sniffed and sat up. Grandma was in the kitchen making corn porridge. The pot bubbled and gurgled, and the golden porridge looked like a little sun. Grandma poured a bowl and said, 'Drink this warm porridge, and you'll feel cozy all over.' Doudou took a careful sip. It was smooth and warm, spreading from his mouth down to his tiny toes. He finished the whole bowl happily and licked his lips. 'Grandma, can I have corn porridge again tomorrow?' Grandma smiled and nodded. From then on, on every cold morning, Doudou remembered the golden, warm porridge and jumped right out of bed.

knowledge.title: How do you make corn porridge?
knowledge.body: Mix cornmeal with a little cold water to make a smooth paste, then slowly pour it into boiling water while stirring. Cook for a few minutes until it becomes thick and creamy, and your corn porridge is ready!
